---
title: "About"
---




```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width = "20%"}
library(knitr)
knitr::include_graphics("janiczek_small2022.png")
```


I am a doctoral candidate at [UMass Amherst Department of Biostatistics](https://www.umass.edu/sphhs/biostatistics), in [Raji Balasubramanian](https://raji-lab.github.io/)'s lab. I completed my MS in Biostatistics at [Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health](https://www.mailman.columbia.edu/). In my free time I enjoy printmaking, thrifting, and enjoying time outdoors. 


### Contact Information
Margaret Janiczek

Email: mjaniczek@umass.edu
